title: hypericum phellos subsp. platyphyllum
intro: Hypericum phellos subsp. platyphyllum, also known as the St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Hypericum genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, due to the presence of hyperforin and hypericin compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum phellos subsp. platyphyllum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote mental well-being and relaxation.
